about.label: ABOUT THE COMPANY
about.title: Reliability and professionalism in construction
about.text: REMSTROY is a construction company founded in 2007, implementing road and industrial infrastructure projects. Modern equipment and skilled specialists ensure quality work on time.
about.textNested1: Main directions: construction of main pipelines, metal structure installation, major repairs, and road construction.
about.textNested2: The company strictly adheres to all construction norms and quality standards.

card1.title: Experienced engineers
card1.text: Our specialists are highly qualified and perform each project with quality.

card2.title: 24/7 customer support
card2.text: We are always ready to assist clients and provide prompt service.

card3.title: Talented team members
card3.text: Our team consists of professional and responsible employees.

believe.title: We believe in the power of big ideas
believe.desc: Since 2007, our company has been working on road construction, main pipelines, and industrial facilities. Modern equipment and an experienced team ensure high-quality and timely completion of every project.
believe.check1: Construction of roads and infrastructure facilities
believe.check2: Construction of main pipelines and industrial facilities
believe.check3: Production and installation of metal structures
believe.check4: Modern special equipment and skilled specialists
believe.check5: Experience working in harsh climatic conditions

stats.title: We achieve big things with big ideas

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.text: Here you can start any project. All necessary resources and tools are ready.

detailed.title: Company details
detailed.intro: Our company was founded in 2007. In a short time, it adapted to market conditions and gained a place thanks to high professionalism and quality results.
specialization_list: Assembly/disassembly of reservoirs using sheet technology
High-pressure main pipelines construction with above-ground and underground insulation
Installation of heat exchangers, technological furnaces, water and sewage systems
Production and installation of metal structures and technological units for the oil and gas industry
Cargo transportation and special equipment services
detailed.equipment_text: Our company has HITACHI, LONKING, HYUNDAI, FOTON, SHANTUI, ZOOMLION excavators, bulldozers, truck cranes (50–200 tons), concrete mixers, irrigation machines, and other special equipment.
detailed.projects: Major projects in Aralboy and Ustyurt regions
projects_list: Ustyurt gas-chemical complex construction and Surgil mine facilities
Facilities for road transport, access roads, gates, and operational services
Gas pipelines: D1020 mm (raw gas), D168 mm (condensate), D720 mm (commodity gas)
Construction of 33 wells and GSP №1,3,4,6 turnkey
Water supply networks, artificial reservoirs, and concrete structures
Expansion and modernization of Kungirot water supply facilities
Tahiatash–Kungirot technical water pipeline (D1020 mm, length 2 km)
Road from wells to GSP, class 5 (length 14.9 km)
detailed.experience_text: 66 reservoirs (1.25–20,000 m³), pipelines from 10 km to 80 km (Ø720 mm, Ø1020 mm, Ø168 mm), total length approx. 25 km of pipes of various diameters (108–1200 mm).
detailed.welding_text: MILLER (USA), BARRACUDA plasma cutting (Germany), NEON units, VDM-1202 rectifiers, Perkins power stations (50–100 kW), plasma cutting of metal up to 40 mm.
detailed.materials_text: High-quality steel pipes, sheets, angles, double-layer profiles, UONI-13/55 electrodes from Volzhskiy, Pervouralsk, Severstal, Magnitogorsk.
detailed.conclusion: REMSTROY is a reliable partner executing complex projects with high quality and on time.

project1.title: Construction of 220kV Double-Circuit Power Line from Navbahor TPS to Parvoz TPS (2024)
project1.descShort: Project for construction and installation of a 220kV double-circuit power line from Navbahor TPS to Parvoz TPS...
project1.descFull: This project, commissioned by JSC “O‘z qishloq elektr qurilish”, involves the construction and installation of a 220kV double-circuit power line from Navbahor TPS 220/27.5/10kV to Parvoz TPS 220/27.5/10kV. The project aims to ensure stable electricity supply in the region, and all necessary construction and installation works were completed. The project was successfully completed in 2024.

project2.title: Construction of 220kV Double-Circuit Power Line from Sarymay PS to Jayhun TPS (2024)
project2.descShort: Project for construction and installation of a 220kV double-circuit power line from Sarymay PS to Jayhun TPS...
project2.descFull: This project, commissioned by JSC “O‘z qishloq elektr qurilish”, involves the construction and installation of a 220kV double-circuit power line from Sarymay PS 220kV to Jayhun TPS 220/27.5/10kV. The project aims to ensure stable electricity supply in the region, and all necessary construction and installation works were completed. The project was successfully completed in 2024.

project3.title: Construction of 500kV Power Transmission Line Turakurgan Chodak (2014)
project3.descShort: Project for construction of a 500kV power transmission line Turakurgan Chodak...
project3.descFull: This project, commissioned by JSC “UZBEKENERGO”, involves the construction and installation of a 500kV power transmission line in Turakurgan Chodak. The project aims to ensure stable electricity supply in the region, and all necessary construction and installation works were completed. The project was successfully completed in 2014.

project4.title: Construction of 220kV Double-Circuit Power Transmission Line from Navbahor to Parvoz TPS (2024)
project4.descShort: Project for construction of a 220kV double-circuit power transmission line from Navbahor to Parvoz TPS...
project4.descFull: This project, commissioned by JSC “O‘z qishloq elektr qurilish”, involves the construction and installation of a 220kV double-circuit power transmission line from 220/27.5/10 kV Navbahor TPS to 220/27.5/10 kV Parvoz TPS. Modern support structures were installed, high-voltage transmission lines were laid, and all necessary construction and installation works were completed. The project aims to increase the stability of electricity supply and the transmission capacity and was successfully completed in 2024.

project5.title: Construction of Ustyurt Gas Chemical Complex at Surgil Field
project5.descShort: Project for the construction of the Ustyurt Gas Chemical Complex at the Surgil field...
project5.descFull: This project was implemented on behalf of UzKorGas Chemical for the construction and installation of the Ustyurt Gas Chemical Complex at the Surgil field. All necessary infrastructure and installation works were completed within the scope of construction. The project aims to increase the production capacity of the gas industry and ensure the full operational launch of the complex.

project6.title: Construction of Ustyurt Gas Chemical Complex at Surgil Field
project6.descShort: Project for the construction of Ustyurt Gas Chemical Complex at Surgil Field...
project6.descFull: This project was implemented on behalf of UzKorGas Chemical for the construction and installation of the Ustyurt Gas Chemical Complex at the Surgil field. All necessary infrastructure and installation works were completed within the construction scope. The project aims to increase the production capacity of the gas industry and bring the complex into full operation.

project7.title: Construction of a gas pipeline from Surgil GPP to UGCC
project7.descShort: Gas pipeline construction project from the Surgil Gas Processing Plant to UGCC...
project7.descFull: This project was implemented by order of UzKorGas Chemical. Within the framework of the project, a crude gas pipeline with a diameter of D1020 mm was constructed from the Surgil Gas Processing Plant (GPP “Surgil”) to the UGCC complex, as well as a condensate pipeline with a diameter of D168 mm. The construction works aim to ensure uninterrupted gas supply and support the development of industrial infrastructure.

project8.title: Construction of petroleum reservoirs
project8.descShort: Petroleum reservoir construction project at the Shurtan Gas Chemical Complex...
project8.descFull: This project was implemented by order of the Shurtan Gas Chemical Complex. Within the project, modern reservoirs for storing petroleum products were constructed. The construction works were carried out in accordance with industrial safety and quality standards, ensuring reliable storage of petroleum products and supporting the development of industrial infrastructure.

project9.title: Construction of IT Park and Hotels (pr-77)
project9.descShort: IT Park and hotel construction project in Bukhara City on pr-77 territory...
project9.descFull: This project was implemented by order of Bukhara City. Within the framework of the project, modern IT Park facilities and hotel complexes were constructed in the pr-77 area. The construction works were carried out according to modern architectural and infrastructure standards, contributing to the economic and tourism development of the region.

reviews.title: Our clients' feedback
reviews.subtitle: Clients who have worked with RSC highly appreciate the company's professional approach and quality work.

1.text: Special attention was paid to the quality of the construction processes. Work was completed on time, and we are satisfied with the result.
1.author: Abduqodirov Dilshod

2.text: The qualification of specialists and their approach to work is at a high level.
2.author: Qarshiyev Aziz

3.text: The company has shown itself as a reliable and responsible partner.
3.author: Tuxsinov Doniyorbek
